common_params.name: partner_id
common_params.description: Partner ID is assigned upon registration is successful. Required for all requests.

common_params.name: timestamp
common_params.description: This is to indicate the timestamp of the request. Required for all requests. Expires in 5 minutes.

common_params.name: access_token
common_params.description: The token for API access, using to identify your permission to the api. Valid for multiple use and expires in 4 hours.

common_params.name: shop_id
common_params.description: Shopee's unique identifier for a shop. Required param for most APIs.

common_params.name: sign
common_params.description: Signature generated by partner_id, api path, timestamp, access_token, shop_id and partner_key via HMAC-SHA256 hashing algorithm. More details: https://open.shopee.com/documents?module=87&type=2&id=58&version=2

define: This API is applicable for Cross Border (CB) sellers only to get the detailed payout transaction data, both released and to-be released transaction can be found in here

request_params.description:
encrypted_payout_id get from API: v2.get_payout_info



when encrypted_payout_id provided and billing_transaction_info_type=2, we will return the "released" billing items under this payout.

when encrypted_payout_id not provided, we will return the "to release" billing items under hasn't form payout yet


Max length: 100
request_params.name: encrypted_payout_ids

request_params.description: Specifies the starting entry of data to return in the current call. Default is "". If data is more than one page, the offset can be some entry to start next call.
request_params.name: cursor

response_params.description: The identifier for an API request for error tracking.
response_params.name: request_id

children.name: remark
children.sample: Deduction on return refund requests raised after order is completed

children.description: To define this transaction happen at order level or shop level. e.g. shop level adjustment
children.name: level

children.description: could be Escrow (Order Income) or Adjustment (for this order)
children.name: billing_transaction_type

request_sample.value:
<?php

$curl = curl_init();

curl_setopt_array($curl, array(
  CURLOPT_URL => 'https://open.admin.uat.shopee.io/api/v2/payment/get_billing_transaction_info?access_token=access_token&partner_id=partner_id&shop_id=shop_id&sign=sign&timestamp=timestamp',
  CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
  CURLOPT_ENCODING => '',
  CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS => 10,
  CURLOPT_TIMEOUT => 0,
  CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,
  CURLOPT_HTTP_VERSION => CURL_HTTP_VERSION_1_1,
  CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST => 'POST',
  CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS => '{
    "billing_transaction_info_type": 1,
    "cursor": "\\"\\"",
    "encrypted_payout_ids": [
        "10376329180766",
        "637926329180767"
    ],
    "page_size": 100
}',
  CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER => array(
    'Content-Type: application/json'
  ),
));

$response = curl_exec($curl);

curl_close($curl);
echo $response;

import requests
import json

url = "https://open.admin.uat.shopee.io/api/v2/payment/get_billing_transaction_info?access_token=access_token&partner_id=partner_id&shop_id=shop_id&sign=sign&timestamp=timestamp"

payload=json.dumps({
  "billing_transaction_info_type": 1,
  "cursor": "\"\"",
  "encrypted_payout_ids": [
    "10376329180766",
    "637926329180767"
  ],
  "page_size": 100
})
headers = {
  'Content-Type': 'application/json'
}
response = requests.RPCRequest("POST",url,headers=headers, data=payload, allow_redirects=False)

print(response.text)

transactions.remark: Deduction on return refund requests raised after order is completed
